artPrompt: A dramatic moment in a smoky back room as a robed goblin Don sweeps both clawed hands across a card table piled with glinting tokens, scattering them outward like a reckoning while shadowed figures recoil in every doorway, debts coming due all at once. A single amber lamp burns above, cigar smoke hanging thick. Mono-black noir of ink shadow and warm lamplight, intimate criminal menace, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Calling In All Favors
text:
Sacrifice any number of Favor tokens. For each one, the player it was owed by sacrifices a permanent of your choice. The Don is calling in every marker in town, all at once, today.
The phone rang in every back room in Whateverville at the same instant. Every goblin who answered went pale.
flavorText: Payment was due. Payment had always been due. They simply hadn't believed it would come.
